title: Bedrock Elytra
description: Allows you to stop in midair while using an elytra just like in Bedrock Edition.
body:
Bedrock Elytra simply adds a way to stop in midair just like in Bedrock Edition, because the more parity, the better. 

Simply jump in air while flying to stop flying and double jump to reactivate your elytra, that's it.

Should be compatible with most mods altering elytras, only Do A Barrel Roll has been tested. Also fully client side.

# Dependencies:

- Fabric API: https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api
